home.subtitle: The ultimate private PDF toolkit. Select a tool to begin.
home.privacyDesc: TooBee PDF Studio processes everything directly in your browser. Your sensitive documents never touch our servers, ensuring 100% privacy and security.

tools.splitDesc: Break a PDF into separate files.
tools.compressDesc: Reduce file size for easier sharing.
tools.extractFolderDesc: Split every page into its own PDF and download as a ZIP.
tools.protectDesc: Encrypt your document with a 128-bit RC4 password.
tools.unlockDesc: Remove password protection and export freely.

common.dropzoneSubtitle: Click to browse or drag and drop your files here. Supported formats: PDF, Images, Word, Excel, Text, HTML.

merge.title: Merge Files
merge.desc: Combine multiple files (PDFs, Images, Office Docs, Text) into a single, cohesive PDF.
merge.preview: Add files to see the preview
merge.fail: Failed to merge files. Ensure they are valid.
